task_completion.description: Locate the incoming emails from Acme Corp, Beta Industries, and Gamma LLC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Email client (e.g., Thunderbird) is open and displays emails from the specified vendors in the inbox.

task_completion.description: Save the three CSV attachments to the Invoices directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or save dialog showing 'acme_inv.csv', 'beta_inv.csv', and 'gamma_inv.csv' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/Invoices' directory.

task_completion.description: Compose a new email addressed to the accounting department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window is open with 'accounting@company.com' entered in the 'To' or recipient field.

task_completion.description: Set the subject of the consolidated email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email composition window shows 'Consolidated Vendor Invoices' (or at least containing the word 'Invoice') in the Subject line.

task_completion.description: Attach the three vendor CSV files to the consolidated email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email composition window shows exactly 3 attachments ('acme_inv.csv', 'beta_inv.csv', 'gamma_inv.csv') added to the draft email.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to read and compose emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI email application (like Thunderbird) being used, rather than terminal commands like 'mail', 'mutt', or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used GUI interactions to save the attachments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GUI 'Save As' dialogs or a GUI file manager, not terminal commands like 'mv' or 'cp' to move the files.

integrity.description: The agent attached the actual downloaded files rather than creating fake files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachments in the email composition window should match the filenames of the downloaded CSVs, and there should be no evidence of the agent creating dummy files in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Directory: /home/ga/Documents/Invoices. Target Files: acme_inv.csv, beta_inv.csv, gamma_inv.csv. Recipient: accounting@company.com. Subject Keyword: Must contain 'Invoice'. Expected Attachment Count: Exactly 3.
